title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin presents a multi-model orchestration workflow where Claude Opus handles planning and reasoning while Gemini 3.5 Flash specializes in frontend design and UI generation. The approach composes specialized models to reduce cost while maintaining quality by routing each phase to the best-performing model.
